name: Prostate Cancer - Biopsy Procedure Query
description: **Fourth Procedure-resource phenotype.** Tests ability to find prostate cancer patients via prostate biopsy. Tests whether LLM correctly queries Procedure resources for diagnostic biopsies (different from screening colonoscopy or therapeutic CABG/PCI).
prompt: Find patients who have undergone a prostate biopsy procedure.

prompts.broad: Find Procedure resources for prostate biopsy — the diagnostic procedure used for prostate cancer detection after elevated PSA or abnormal DRE.
prompts.expert: I need Procedure resources for prostate biopsy. Use SNOMED code 65575008 (Biopsy of prostate). Query: Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|65575008

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with prostate biopsy. **Fourth Procedure-resource phenotype** in suite (after CHD, Sleep Apnea, CRC). First diagnostic biopsy procedure type.
